text: There is an otherworldly mood in this glowing, angular space—purple light spilling from a glass-encased room into the dim hall, hinting at secret discussions or undisclosed possibilities. Moving further, the bold letters "R+D" on a blue and pink wall signify a place where ideas are conceived and tested. The large glowing screen with philosophical text draws me in, making me feel like both an observer and a participant in an ongoing experiment. Here, beneath technology’s quiet hum, I sense quiet excitement and curiosity—my mind alert, eager to interpret, yet aware of mystery everywhere.
